HomePage.title: Relax. Reset. Restore
HomePage.subtitle: A float sanctuary & wellness center for deep healing and nervous system regulation by the ancient temples of Angkor.
HomePage.paragraph:
In addition to 60 and 90 minute float sessions, we offer comprehensive nervous system reset journeys that combine massage, acupuncture, sound healing, breathwork and integration play.
 
 After long days exploring the mysteries of the Angkor temples, this is an invitation to slow down, soften and come home to yourself.

WhyFloatPage.title: Why Float?
WhyFloatPage.subtitle: Discover the science and soul of zero-gravity therapy.
WhyFloatPage.intro: Floating is a scientifically proven method for deep physical and mental restoration. By removing external stimuli, your nervous system can finally rest, allowing for profound states of meditation and recovery that are difficult to reach in daily life.
WhyFloatPage.scientificBasis: The high concentration of Epsom salts (magnesium sulfate) creates a zero-gravity environment that relieves all pressure on your joints and spine. Meanwhile, the magnesium absorption helps regulate over 300 biochemical reactions in the body, including muscle function and stress management.
WhyFloatPage.mentalHealth: The absence of external light and sound allows the brain to transition from its normal alpha and beta waves into deep theta waves—the state usually reserved for experienced meditators and deep sleep. This results in an unprecedented reduction in cortisol levels and a natural boost in dopamine and endorphins.
WhyFloatPage.physicalRecovery: Athletes and individuals with chronic pain find floating to be a powerful tool for recovery. The weightless environment increases blood flow to all parts of the body, accelerating the healing of muscle tissues and reducing inflammation, while the high magnesium content helps flush out toxins and lactic acid.
WhyFloatPage.ctaParagraph: Join us for a session and discover the profound benefits of floating for your mind and body.
